creator: andy.lavr@gmail.com
text:
Attached is a shar file for mysql-workbench-5.2.47.
This new port (databases/mysql-workbench) is intended to supersede
mysql-workbench51 and mysql-workbench52.

A few notes:
- It works with MySQL 5.5/5.6
- It will compile with Clang

NOTE:

Please view http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170078

No problem, everything builds and runs.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
